title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.578 - Amended certificate of authority
text:
351.578.  Amended certificate of authority. — 1.  A foreign corporation authorized to transact business in this state shall obtain an amended certificate of authority from the secretary of state if it changes:
  (1)  Its corporate name;
  (2)  The period of its duration; or
  (3)  The state or country of its incorporation.
  2.  The requirements of section 351.576 for obtaining an original certificate of authority apply to obtaining an amended certificate under this section.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1432)
